heading: Definitions
label: 460ccc Definitions
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–621, § 1104 Stat. 3342Nov. 16, 1990“This Act [enacting this subchapter] may be cited as the ‘Red Rock Canyon National Conservation Area Establishment Act of 1990’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–621, § 1104 Stat. 3342Nov. 16, 1990“This Act [enacting this subchapter] may be cited as the ‘Red Rock Canyon National Conservation Area Establishment Act of 1990’.”

children.label: a
children.text: “conservation area” means the Red Rock Canyon National Conservation Area established pursuant to ;section 460ccc–1 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: “public lands” has the meaning stated in ; andsection 1702(e) of title 43

children.label: c
children.text: “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
